questions.q: Which voice actor, known for playing Gene on 'Bob's Burgers,' was hospitalized after a fiery car crash in Bedford, New Hampshire?
questions.correctText: Eugene Mirman, the voice of Gene Belcher on 'Bob's Burgers,' was hospitalized after a serious car crash in Bedford, New Hampshire on April 1, 2026.

questions.q: Which Fleetwood Mac legend was reportedly attacked with an 'unknown substance' by a stalking suspect in Santa Monica on April 1, 2026?
questions.correctText: Fleetwood Mac's Lindsey Buckingham was reportedly attacked with an 'unknown substance' by a woman described as a stalking suspect in Santa Monica on April 1, 2026.

questions.q: Bruce Springsteen kicked off his US 'Land of Hope and Dreams American Tour' on March 31, 2026, in which city, with a politically charged message?
questions.correctText: Bruce Springsteen and The E Street Band launched their 'Land of Hope and Dreams American Tour' in Minneapolis, Minnesota, on March 31, 2026, with a politically charged message.

questions.q: During a podcast discussion with Billy Corgan on April 1, 2026, Courtney Love claimed a famous Nirvana lyric from 'Heart-Shaped Box' was inspired by her negative feelings towards which fellow musician?
questions.correctText: Courtney Love told Billy Corgan on his podcast on April 1, 2026, that the Nirvana lyric 'Forever in debt to your priceless advice' from 'Heart-Shaped Box' was 'literally about Kim' Gordon.

questions.q: David Fincher's 'Fight Club' is receiving a 4K remaster and a one-night-only theatrical re-release on April 22, 2026. When will the 4K Ultra HD Steelbook be available?
questions.correctText: David Fincher's 'Fight Club' will have a one-night-only theatrical re-release in 4K on April 22, 2026, with the 4K Ultra HD Steelbook set to be released on May 12, 2026.
